yourUsecase.title: Your Agent
yourUsecase.description: Short description of what this agent does
yourUsecase.promptPlaceholder: Describe your goals, requirements, and any relevant details...
yourUsecase.contextPlaceholder: Specify any useful information (competitive context, specific stakes...)

starter.title: Welcome to your Elio scaffold
starter.description: Drop your product.md and backlog.md (both artifacts produced by the Value Office). The Agent PO iterates the backlog with you, then the Agent Builder ships user stories one at a time.
starter.cleanupHint: Once your app is built, ask the Replit AI: "Remove the starter page" to clean up.

product.title: I have a product.md
product.desc: Produced by the AgentApp Elio - Value Office. The Agent PO uses it to iterate a backlog with you before the Agent Builder constructs the app.

valueOffice.title: No product.md yet?
valueOffice.desc: Start with the AgentApp Elio - Value Office — it helps you turn your use case into a product.md ready to vibe-code here.

upload.productStepHint: The file produced by the AgentApp Elio - Value Office. It will be placed at the project root.
upload.backlogStepHint: The second file produced by the AgentApp Elio - Value Office. Contains the MoSCoW user stories with their Status checkbox — the Agent Builder uses it to ship one story at a time.
upload.prototypeStepHint: A Google AI Studio prototype helps the Agent PO align on the expected look & feel. Leave empty if you don't have one.
upload.thenStep: 4. Validate with the PO and launch the build
upload.thenStepNoProduct: Drop your product.md first (step 1) to receive the prompt to paste into the Replit chat.
